hero.subtitle: AI that knows your brand and generates content, editorial calendars, competitor analysis and hooks. Without explaining anything every time.
hero.ctaNote: Free early access · No credit card.

waitlistSuccess.title: Your spot is reserved.
waitlistSuccess.subtitle: You'll be among the first to test it and get the best available price.

step2.title: Your spot is reserved! Help us understand how we can help you better.
step2.goals: What do you want to do with AI? (select all that apply)
step2.frustration: What's your biggest frustration with current AI tools? (optional)
step2.call: Would a 15-min call about your business challenges with an expert help?

situation.title: The current situation
situation.subtitle: You already know how it goes...

steps.open: You open ChatGPT. Or Claude. Or any other tool.
steps.explain3: You explain your offer, tone, context. Again.
steps.result: 45 minutes later... you have mediocre copy that doesn't sound like you. And tomorrow you start over.

situation.conclusion: AI isn't the problem. The problem is you reset it every time and it knows nothing about your business. We built something different.

difference.title: Why it's different
difference.subtitle: An AI that knows you. And doesn't forget.
difference.body: You complete a 5-minute onboarding once. From then on, every generation starts with your full context — brand, audience, tone of voice, offers.

memory.title: Permanent brand memory
memory.desc: Brand, audience, offers, tone of voice. Stored once, applied automatically to every generation. No more explaining.

focused.title: Full content generator
focused.desc: Facebook Post, Instagram, LinkedIn, Email newsletter, Meta Ad — each with specific rules. Translate into 10 languages with one click.

psychology.title: Automatic editorial calendar
psychology.desc: Generate a weekly post plan for any platform. Drag and drop to reorder. Send the plan by email in one click.

spy.title: Spy AI — analyze competitors
spy.desc: Paste any Facebook page or website URL. The AI tells you what strategies they use, what messages work, and how you can beat them.

hooks.title: Hook Generator
hooks.desc: Generate 10 hooks for any topic — curiosity, shock, statistics, personal stories. The first sentence that stops the scroll.

voice.title: Write like me (Voice Cloning)
voice.desc: Paste 3–10 of your own texts. The AI extracts your unique style and writes exactly like you — rhythm, expressions, tone.

refused.title: What we refused to build
refused.subtitle: We chose to do one thing exceptionally well, not ten things poorly.

prompts.title: A prompt library
prompts.desc: Prompts are a bandaid on a broken process. We fixed the process.

tools.title: 14 tools duct-taped together
tools.desc: Separate tools mean context lost between them. Everything is in one place.

templates.title: Generic templates
templates.desc: Templates exist when AI doesn't know your business. Ours knows it in detail.

chatbot.title: A general chatbot
chatbot.desc: It doesn't answer everything. It builds your marketing with all your context.

earlyAccess.title: Early access
earlyAccess.subtitle: Be among the first to try it.
earlyAccess.body: Free sign-up. You'll get access before the public launch and influence what we build.

andreea.text: I used to spend 3 hours a week writing posts. Now I generate them in 5 minutes and they sound exactly like me.
andreea.name: Andreea M.

radu.text: I grew Instagram engagement by 40% in the first month. The AI understands exactly what my customers want.
radu.name: Radu P.

cristina.text: We sell online and needed copy for every product. Now we generate all content in minutes.
cristina.name: Cristina V.

dan.text: Our Meta ads have double the CTR vs what we used to write. Worth every credit.
dan.name: Dan S.

demo.title: How it looks in practice
demo.subtitle: Simple. Fast. Yours.
demo.body: Choose the content type and objective. The AI already knows your brand, audience and tone. Generate in seconds, copy and publish.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: From €9/month. Cancel anytime.
pricing.body: No contracts, no surprises. Plans for every business size.

q1.q: How does the AI know how to write like my brand?
q1.a: At first login you complete a 5-minute onboarding: industry, audience, tone of voice, active channels and your USP. These become the AI's permanent context — your brand is memorized and applied to every generation.

q2.q: Am I locked into a subscription?
q2.a: No. Cancel anytime from your account, no penalties, no phone calls needed. Access stays active until the end of the paid period.

q3.a: Content generator (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Email, Meta Ads), Automatic editorial calendar, Spy AI (competitor analysis), Hook Generator (psychological hooks), Persuasion Score (text persuasion scoring), Voice Cloning (write like you). Translation into 10 languages.

q4.q: What happens when I run out of credits?
q4.a: Generation stops and you're notified. You can buy extra credits or upgrade from the dashboard. Credits are added immediately after payment.

q5.q: Is this related to Nesco Digital agency?
q5.a: Yes. Nesco Digital AI is built by the Nesco Digital team, a marketing agency with experience across dozens of businesses. The product distills everything we've learned from years of campaigns into a tool any entrepreneur can use.

welcome.title: Welcome to your workspace.
welcome.subtitle: Before you generate your first content, let's get to know your brand. Takes 3–5 minutes.
welcome.intro: What the system does after setup:

features.title: Generate content
features.desc: Facebook Post, Instagram, LinkedIn, Email, Meta Ad — in your style, with your context.

features.title: Editorial calendar
features.desc: Auto-generated weekly post plan, with drag & drop to reorder.

features.title: Spy AI
features.desc: Analyze your competitors and see what strategies they use and how to beat them.

features.title: Hook Generator
features.desc: Generate 10 psychological hooks for any topic — the first sentence that stops the scroll.

features.title: Persuasion Score
features.desc: Analyze any text and get a 0–100 score with concrete improvement suggestions.

features.desc: Paste 3+ of your own texts and the AI tries to write exactly like you from then on.
